prompt: A lone figure seen from behind, standing still in the center of a vast, warmly lit gathering — hundreds of people laughing, embracing, deep in conversation around them. Every other person is visibly connected to at least two others. The central figure touches no one and is touched by no one, yet is completely surrounded. The crowd is not hostile — there is no drama. The isolation is structural, not emotional. Cinematic, soft golden light, shallow depth of field pulling focus toward the lone figure. Photorealistic. No text, no labels, no diagrams, no mathematical notation.
visual_logic: A structurally isolated figure surrounded by visibly interconnected people — the isolation is mathematical, not emotional, mirroring how popular nodes dominate friend lists making everyone feel below average.
